mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_record ( campaign_id, process_instance_id, task_id, task_name, approver_id, approver_name, action, comment, approve_time, create_time ) VALUES ( #{campaignId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processInstanceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{approverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, campaign_id, process_instance_id, task_id, task_name, approver_id, approver_name, action, comment, approve_time, create_time FROM approval_record WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT id, campaign_id, process_instance_id, task_id, task_name, approver_id, approver_name, action, comment, approve_time, create_time FROM approval_record
mapper.update: UPDATE approval_record SET campaign_id = #{campaignId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_name = #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approver_id = #{approverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, approver_name = #{approverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, action = #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approve_time = #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
